hero.title: The AI Institute for Asia
hero.subtitle: Equipping professionals with Agentic AI, Algorithmic Trading & Cybersecurity capabilities.

certified.heading: Curriculum designed and delivered by officially certified instructors

mission.statement: Metaskills Institute equips our community with the knowledge, skills and experiences to
mission.highlight1: tackle the AI challenges of tomorrow
mission.pillar1Desc: A portfolio of impactful programmes for early professionals to senior executives in Agentic AI, Data Science, and Algorithmic Trading.
mission.pillar2Desc: Our faculty bring their real-world consulting and deployment expertise — combined with over a decade of university-level teaching — to every classroom.
mission.pillar3Desc: Every programme integrates technical depth, strategic thinking, and implementation frameworks aligned with enterprise and government standards.

programmes.title: Our Programmes
programmes.subtitle: Find the right programme for you.
programmes.glance: All our programmes at a glance
programmes.agenticDesc: Designing, deploying, and governing autonomous AI agents for real-world enterprise applications.
programmes.aiAutoDesc: From no-code workflows to AI coding agents — practical, hands-on workshops on building and deploying intelligent automation systems.
programmes.dataDesc: From Python programming to advanced machine learning — practical, project-based data science education.
programmes.fintechDesc: Data-driven trading strategies powered by automation and analytics for financial markets.
programmes.cyberDesc: Comprehensive cybersecurity overview — fundamentals, threat landscape, key roles, and certification roadmap planning.
programmes.aiLeadDesc: Strategy workshops for senior leaders — AI adoption roadmaps, accountability frameworks, agent governance, and AI wargaming.
programmes.mccDesc: Consolidated cybersecurity certification programme — 4-day core foundation plus 1-day electives aligned to Security+, CySA+, CEH, CHFI, and SecAI.

why.title: Why Metaskills
why.intro: Our trainers are active AI consultants and deployment specialists. This industry immersion means every lesson is grounded in practical challenges and opportunities that matter today.
why.feat1Desc: Our instructors are active AI consultants and deployment specialists working with corporates, government agencies, and universities.
why.feat2Desc: Guided by master trainers with over a decade of university-level teaching and corporate training experience.
why.feat3Desc: Certifications designed in partnership with industry and government — recognised across Singapore and ASEAN.
why.feat4Desc: We simplify complex AI concepts into practical steps, making them accessible for learners at all levels.
why.feat5Desc: Our faculty have collectively trained more than 10,000 professionals across Singapore and ASEAN.
why.feat6Desc: Connect to Singapore's growing AI and digital innovation ecosystem through alumni events and industry partnerships.

faculty.title: Our Core Faculty
faculty.subtitle: Practitioners, researchers, and educators who have collectively trained more than 10,000 professionals.

locations.title: Our Learning Spaces
locations.subtitle: World-class facilities designed for hands-on, immersive learning experiences.
locations.hqDesc: Located at 114 Lavender Street, CT Hub 2, #07-74, Singapore 338729. Our main campus equipped with state-of-the-art facilities for hands-on AI training.
locations.trainingDesc: Modern collaborative learning spaces designed for immersive, project-based programmes.
locations.labDesc: A dedicated space for AI research, prototyping, and industry collaborations.
locations.confDesc: Fully equipped boardroom with presentation displays and whiteboard for strategy sessions and corporate workshops.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.subtitle: Join a community of forward-thinking professionals. Our programmes are designed for individuals and organisations seeking to build real-world AI capabilities.
admissions.benefit1: Industry-recognised certifications in Agentic AI and Applied Data Science
admissions.benefit2: Practical, project-based curriculum designed by master trainers
admissions.benefit3: Access to Singapore's growing AI and digital innovation ecosystem
admissions.benefit4: Alumni events and industry partnership opportunities
admissions.benefit5: Programmes endorsed by faculty teaching at universities and government agencies
admissions.benefit6: Available in English, Chinese, and Vietnamese

footer.tagline: ASEAN's go-to partner for Agentic AI, Algorithmic Trading, and Cybersecurity capability building.
